focus: downstream transport architecture and judgment boundary

graphEvents.label: mcp-refero is a non-mutating mcp-tooling transport
All external calls go through Code Mode
sk-design precedes retrieval and owns acceptance

label: mcp-refero belongs on the mcp-tooling transport axis
Refero packet needs only read tools plus Code Mode discovery and execution
Existing manual yields refero.refero_<tool> callable names
Transport allowlists exactly eight current Refero operations
Argument validation must enforce identifier unions and documented bounds
sk-design manager intake and judgment precede Refero retrieval
Refero results are evidence and never taste authority
Credential-free contract tests and operator auth smoke tests must be separate

direction: Make Refero a standalone hub or sk-design mode
reason: It is a transport under mcp-tooling and sk-design owns judgment

direction: Grant Bash to the Refero packet
reason: Code Mode owns the existing stdio manual and its mcp-remote process

direction: Use ranking or similarity as a taste verdict
reason: Transport output is evidence for sk-design acceptance
